sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Brentford are in excellent form, winning 4 of their last 5 matches and remaining unbeaten in 6. Fulham, on the other hand, have struggled recently with 3 losses in their last 5 games and no clean sheets in 8 matches, indicating defensive vulnerabilities.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, Fulham edged out Brentford 2-1 in the most recent match, while the earlier game ended in a 0-0 draw. Historically, matches between these two often see over 2.5 goals, with 6 of the last 7 exceeding this mark.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Tactics
sections.text: Brentford's attacking duo of Yoane Wissa and Bryan Mbeumo are in top form, contributing significantly to goals and assists. Fulham miss key players like Antonee Robinson, which may impact their defensive structure and ability to create chances.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Brentford rank higher in goals scored (63 vs Fulham's 51) and have a strong aerial presence (52.9% duels won). Fulham's defense has been leaky, conceding in every game recently, which Brentford could exploit with their high penalty area entries.
